headline: Assessing Applied Materials (AMAT) Valuation After New 2nm And Angstrom Era Chip Tools Fuel AI Excitement
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) has drawn fresh attention after unveiling two deposition systems for 2nm and angstrom era AI chips, a move that helped lift the stock and spotlight its role in advanced chip fabrication. See our latest analysis for Applied Materials. The launch of the new 2nm and angstrom era tools comes after a strong run in the shares, with a 30 day share price return of 18.45% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 178.09%. This suggests that momentum has been building ahead of...
